ab: mapitu wagi’ tehuk cu papasba’an ci ke’ soni’.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: palapuw la. maṟuk lalapgan ci patas ka sinsi’. “tatuli’, pastukung” ma ka pancang.
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: yotas ka ke’ min maha; “sinsi’ ramas su’.”
lunpuw patas ci kaca ga, pasba’an mini lalapuw ci ke’ na itaṟal ni sinsi’.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Atayal language of numbers.

ab: gunluw min lunpuw sinsi’. mawas min ci awas na lalapuw uṟi.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: payux ka ke’ na itaṟal wal mu ba’un.
en: I have learned many Atayal languages.

ab: musa’ cu papasba’an ci ke’ karirex. sunbaba’ cu ci ke’ na itaṟal karirex. papungan mu yayan mu.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Atayal language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
